scripts.setup: yarn install --immutable && yarn env:populate:playwright:aat && yarn pwinstall
scripts.harness:local:exui4493:toolkit: PW_ODHIN_OUTPUT=test-results/exui-4493-toolkit-odhin-report PW_ODHIN_INDEX=exui-4493-toolkit.html PW_ODHIN_TITLE='EXUI-4493 installed toolkit proof' ./node_modules/.bin/playwright test --project=api src/tests/api/exui-historic-replay-packs.api.ts -g 'EXUI-4493 installed webapp toolkit'
scripts.test:api: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; PW_LOAD_PROFILE_OUTPUT=${PW_LOAD_PROFILE_OUTPUT:-functional-output/tests/api_functional/odhin-report/load-profile} node scripts/playwright-load-monitor.cjs --report-folder functional-output/tests/api_functional/odhin-report --report-folder functional-output/tests/playwright-api/odhin-report --label "${PW_LOAD_PROFILE_LABEL:-API}" -- yarn test:api:raw "$@"' --
scripts.test:api:raw: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; rm -rf functional-output/tests/playwright-api/odhin-report functional-output/tests/api_functional/odhin-report coverage && export PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER=functional-output/tests/playwright-api/odhin-report PW_ODHIN_TARGET=functional-output/tests/api_functional/odhin-report PW_ODHIN_INDEX=playwright-odhin.html PLAYWRIGHT_REPORTERS=${PLAYWRIGHT_REPORTERS:-list,odhin}; ./node_modules/.bin/playwright test "$@" --project=api; status=$?; node ./scripts/copy-odhin-report.cjs; exit $status' --
scripts.test:api:ci: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; PW_LOAD_PROFILE_OUTPUT=${PW_LOAD_PROFILE_OUTPUT:-functional-output/tests/api_functional/odhin-report/load-profile} node scripts/playwright-load-monitor.cjs --report-folder functional-output/tests/api_functional/odhin-report --report-folder functional-output/tests/playwright-api/odhin-report --label "${PW_LOAD_PROFILE_LABEL:-API CI}" -- yarn test:api:ci:raw "$@"' --
scripts.test:api:ci:raw: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; rm -rf functional-output/tests/playwright-api/odhin-report functional-output/tests/api_functional/odhin-report coverage && export API_PW_EXCLUDED_TAGS_OVERRIDE=${API_PW_EXCLUDED_TAGS_OVERRIDE:-@svc-work-allocation} PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER=functional-output/tests/playwright-api/odhin-report PW_ODHIN_TARGET=functional-output/tests/api_functional/odhin-report PW_ODHIN_INDEX=playwright-odhin.html PLAYWRIGHT_REPORTERS=${PLAYWRIGHT_REPORTERS:-list,odhin,junit}; ./node_modules/.bin/playwright test "$@" --project=api; status=$?; node ./scripts/copy-odhin-report.cjs; exit $status' --
scripts.test:api:coverage: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; PW_LOAD_PROFILE_OUTPUT=${PW_LOAD_PROFILE_OUTPUT:-functional-output/tests/api_functional/odhin-report/load-profile} node scripts/playwright-load-monitor.cjs --report-folder functional-output/tests/api_functional/odhin-report --report-folder functional-output/tests/playwright-api/odhin-report --label "${PW_LOAD_PROFILE_LABEL:-API coverage}" -- yarn test:api:coverage:raw "$@"' --
scripts.test:api:coverage:raw: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; rm -rf functional-output/tests/playwright-api/odhin-report functional-output/tests/api_functional/odhin-report functional-output/tests/api_functional/logs coverage && export PW_ODHIN_LINK_COVERAGE=true PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER=functional-output/tests/playwright-api/odhin-report PW_ODHIN_TARGET=functional-output/tests/api_functional/odhin-report PW_ODHIN_INDEX=playwright-odhin.html PLAYWRIGHT_REPORTERS=${PLAYWRIGHT_REPORTERS:-list,odhin,junit} LOG_LEVEL=${LOG_LEVEL:-warn}; yarn c8 --reporter=lcov --reporter=json-summary --reporter=text --reporter=text-summary --reporter=html --report-dir ./coverage playwright test "$@" --project=api; status=$?; if [ "$status" -ne 0 ]; then echo "Playwright API coverage failed."; fi; node ./scripts/reportCoverage.cjs || true; node ./scripts/copy-odhin-report.cjs || true; exit "$status"' --
scripts.test:integration: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER=${PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER:-functional-output/tests/playwright-integration/odhin-report} PW_LOAD_PROFILE_OUTPUT=${PW_LOAD_PROFILE_OUTPUT:-${PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER}/load-profile} node scripts/playwright-load-monitor.cjs --report-folder "${PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER}" --label "${PW_LOAD_PROFILE_LABEL:-Integration}" -- yarn test:integration:raw "$@"' --
scripts.test:integration:raw: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; export PW_UI_STORAGE=1 PW_ODHIN_INDEX=${PW_ODHIN_INDEX:-playwright-odhin-integration.html} PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER=${PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER:-functional-output/tests/playwright-integration/odhin-report} PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_INDEX_FILENAME=${PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_INDEX_FILENAME:-playwright-odhin-integration.html} PW_ODHIN_FALLBACK_SUITE_NAME="${PW_ODHIN_FALLBACK_SUITE_NAME:-Playwright Integration Test}" PLAYWRIGHT_REPORTERS=${PLAYWRIGHT_REPORTERS:-list,odhin}; ./node_modules/.bin/playwright test "$@" --project=integration; status=$?; node ./scripts/ensure-odhin-report.cjs || true; exit "$status"' --
scripts.test:integration:nightly: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER=${PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER:-functional-output/tests/playwright-integration-nightly/odhin-report} PW_LOAD_PROFILE_OUTPUT=${PW_LOAD_PROFILE_OUTPUT:-${PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER}/load-profile} node scripts/playwright-load-monitor.cjs --report-folder "${PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER}" --label "${PW_LOAD_PROFILE_LABEL:-Integration nightly}" -- yarn test:integration:nightly:raw "$@"' --
scripts.test:integration:nightly:raw: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; export INTEGRATION_PW_INCLUDE_TAGS=${INTEGRATION_PW_INCLUDE_TAGS:-@nightly} INTEGRATION_PW_EXCLUDED_TAGS_OVERRIDE=${INTEGRATION_PW_EXCLUDED_TAGS_OVERRIDE:-@integration-bucket-6} PW_UI_STORAGE=1 PW_ODHIN_INDEX=${PW_ODHIN_INDEX:-playwright-odhin-integration-nightly.html} PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER=${PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER:-functional-output/tests/playwright-integration-nightly/odhin-report} PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_INDEX_FILENAME=${PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_INDEX_FILENAME:-playwright-odhin-integration-nightly.html} PW_ODHIN_FALLBACK_SUITE_NAME="${PW_ODHIN_FALLBACK_SUITE_NAME:-Playwright Integration Nightly}" PLAYWRIGHT_REPORTERS=${PLAYWRIGHT_REPORTERS:-list,odhin}; ./node_modules/.bin/playwright test "$@" --project=integration-nightly; status=$?; node ./scripts/ensure-odhin-report.cjs || true; exit "$status"' --
scripts.test:playwright:integration: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; if [ "${PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_INSTALL}" != "true" ]; then ./node_modules/.bin/playwright install; fi; yarn test:integration "$@"' --
scripts.test:ui: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; PW_LOAD_PROFILE_OUTPUT=${PW_LOAD_PROFILE_OUTPUT:-functional-output/tests/playwright-e2e/odhin-report/load-profile} node scripts/playwright-load-monitor.cjs --report-folder functional-output/tests/playwright-e2e/odhin-report --label "${PW_LOAD_PROFILE_LABEL:-E2E}" -- yarn test:ui:raw "$@"' --
scripts.test:ui:raw: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; export PW_UI_STORAGE=1 PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER=functional-output/tests/playwright-e2e/odhin-report PW_ODHIN_TARGET=functional-output/tests/playwright-e2e/odhin-report PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_INDEX_FILENAME=playwright-odhin.html PW_ODHIN_FALLBACK_SUITE_NAME="Playwright E2E Test" PLAYWRIGHT_REPORTERS=${PLAYWRIGHT_REPORTERS:-list,odhin}; ./node_modules/.bin/playwright test "$@" --project=ui; status=$?; node ./scripts/ensure-odhin-report.cjs || true; exit "$status"' --
scripts.test:crossbrowser: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; PW_LOAD_PROFILE_OUTPUT=${PW_LOAD_PROFILE_OUTPUT:-functional-output/tests/playwright-e2e/odhin-report/load-profile} node scripts/playwright-load-monitor.cjs --report-folder functional-output/tests/playwright-e2e/odhin-report --label "${PW_LOAD_PROFILE_LABEL:-E2E cross-browser}" -- yarn test:crossbrowser:raw "$@"' --
scripts.test:crossbrowser:raw: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; if [ "${PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_INSTALL}" != "true" ]; then ./node_modules/.bin/playwright install --with-deps && ./node_modules/.bin/playwright install webkit && ./node_modules/.bin/playwright install firefox; fi; export E2E_PW_INCLUDE_TAGS=${E2E_PW_INCLUDE_TAGS:-@nightly} E2E_PW_EXCLUDED_TAGS_OVERRIDE=${E2E_PW_EXCLUDED_TAGS_OVERRIDE:-@none} PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER=functional-output/tests/playwright-e2e/odhin-report PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_INDEX_FILENAME=playwright-odhin-nightly.html PW_ODHIN_INDEX=playwright-odhin-nightly.html PW_ODHIN_FALLBACK_SUITE_NAME="Playwright E2E Cross-Browser"; ./node_modules/.bin/playwright test -c playwright-nightly.config.ts "$@"; status=$?; node ./scripts/ensure-odhin-report.cjs || true; exit "$status"' --
